page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highcpu-360 is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by AMD EPYC 9B14 processors using the x86_64 architecture. It features 360 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 180 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The instance is equipped with 708.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 1.97 GB. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier multi-core performance, with stress-ng multi-core and Passmark CPU scores ranking in the top 10%. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, achieving 27219.96 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 695.17 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. The CPU supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and cryptography acceleration, contributing to top-tier performance in database operations, software compilation, and static web serving.

While multi-threaded throughput and prompt processing for large language models are exceptional, single-threaded tasks and text generation speeds fall into the average to strong categories. The lack of local storage and GPU hardware limits its use for direct high-speed local disk operations or GPU-dependent deep learning. This instance is highly cost-efficient for massive parallel compute workloads, high-throughput web serving, software compilation, and CPU-based LLM prompt processing.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highcpu-360 is a compute-optimized instance featuring 360 dedicated vCPUs on AMD EPYC 9B14 processors with x86_64 architecture. It provides 708.0 GB of RAM, resulting in a low memory-to-core ratio of 1.97 GB, and does not include local storage or GPUs. Benchmarks show top-tier multi-core CPU performance, exceptional memory bandwidth, and high throughput for database operations and software compilation. However, single-threaded performance and text generation speeds are moderate. This instance is best suited for highly parallelized CPU-bound workloads, static web serving, and large-scale software compilation.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highcpu-360 is a compute-optimized instance with 360 AMD EPYC vCPUs and 708 GB RAM, delivering top-tier multi-core performance and memory bandwidth for highly parallel workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highcpu-360 is a compute-optimized instance featuring 360 AMD EPYC vCPUs and 708 GB RAM for high-throughput parallel workloads.
tagline: A high-density, compute-optimized virtual machine delivering exceptional multi-core performance and memory bandwidth for parallel processing workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by AMD EPYC 9B14 processors with 360 dedicated vCPUs and 180 physical cores
Equipped with 708.0 GB of RAM, optimized for compute-heavy tasks
Top-tier multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth benchmarks
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Best suited for software compilation, database operations, and high-throughput web serving
